app.name: nblm-rs
app.one_liner: An unofficial NotebookLM Enterprise API client built on a Rust core, with interfaces for both the CLI and a Python SDK.

screens.name: Main CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Provide command-line access to NotebookLM Enterprise API operations including authentication, notebook management, and diagnostics.
primary_actions: Authenticate user via browser-based OAuth2 flow
Run diagnostics with Google Drive access validation

rust_commands.name: auth
rust_commands.purpose: Manage authentication for NotebookLM Enterprise API using OAuth2 with browser flow and gcloud integration.

rust_commands.name: doctor
rust_commands.purpose: Validate environment setup including Google Drive access and command availability with colorized output.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add type-safe CLI flags for notebook creation and management
week 1: Implement OAuth2 user authentication flow with gcloud integration
week 1: Set up MkDocs documentation and CI/CD workflows
acceptance_tests: CLI accepts high-level flags instead of raw JSON and correctly constructs API requests with proper resource naming.
User can complete OAuth2 browser flow and cache tokens securely via gcloud integration.
